messages.message: Flesch Reading Ease is 32.57. Keep it at 61 or higher.
Gunning Fog is 25.27. Keep it at 12 or lower.

Negation reframe found: "No Disk Mess (Piping): We don't write thousands of temp PNG files to your drive. Instead, we stream raw frames directly through memory.". Rewrite without the not-X-then-Y construction.
